steps.name: WritingStyleGateEvaluator domain logic
steps.description: Pure domain evaluator. Blocks Write/Edit to wave-4-drafting/ when quality-preferences.json absent from global_artifacts_present and no writing_style_selection_skipped in state.
criteria: Write to wave-4-drafting/ blocked when quality-preferences.json not in global_artifacts_present and no skip marker
Write to wave-4-drafting/ allowed when quality-preferences.json in global_artifacts_present
Write to wave-4-drafting/ allowed when writing_style_selection_skipped is true in state
Both Write and Edit operations subject to the gate
Writes outside wave-4-drafting/ not affected

steps.name: Hook adapter global artifact resolution for wave-4-drafting
steps.description: Extend resolve_tool_context to detect wave-4-drafting/ in file_path. Resolve ~/.sbir/ for global artifact existence. Populate tool_context['global_artifacts_present'].
criteria: When file_path targets wave-4-drafting/, global_artifacts_present populated
quality-preferences.json at ~/.sbir/ detected and listed in global_artifacts_present
When file_path is outside wave-4-drafting/, global_artifacts_present is empty list
Existing wave-5-visuals/ resolution and artifacts_present behavior unchanged
Both multi-proposal and legacy path layouts resolved correctly

steps.name: Register evaluator in engine and add config rule
steps.description: Register WritingStyleGateEvaluator in EnforcementEngine._evaluators dict. Add rule to pes-config.json. Verify dispatch end-to-end.
criteria: Engine _evaluators contains 'writing_style_gate' mapped to WritingStyleGateEvaluator
pes-config.json contains rule 'drafting-requires-style-selection' with type 'writing_style_gate'
Engine total evaluator count is 8
Engine total rule count in config is 11

steps.name: Integration tests: end-to-end writing style gate enforcement
steps.description: Integration tests loading real pes-config.json through engine. Verify gate blocks and allows correctly through full hook-to-evaluator path including global artifact resolution.
criteria: Draft write blocked end-to-end when quality-preferences.json absent (config -> adapter -> engine -> evaluator -> BLOCK)
Draft write allowed end-to-end when quality-preferences.json present at ~/.sbir/
Draft write allowed when writing_style_selection_skipped in state
Gate does not interfere with existing wave-5-visuals/ gates

steps.name: BDD acceptance tests from feature scenarios
steps.description: Acceptance tests implementing all 17 Gherkin scenarios from journey-writing-style-gate.feature. Validates blocking, allowing, path resolution, non-interference, and audit trail.
criteria: All 17 scenarios from journey-writing-style-gate.feature pass
Audit log entries verified for block and allow decisions
Multi-proposal and legacy path layouts covered

steps.name: Writer agent style checkpoint in Phase 3 DRAFT
steps.description: Add mandatory style checkpoint to sbir-writer.md Phase 3 before first section draft. Present styles with quality-profile-aware recommendations. Record choice or skip in state.
criteria: Style checkpoint presented before first section draft when writing_style not in state
Checkpoint skipped when writing_style already set in state
Quality artifacts from ~/.sbir/ used for recommendations when present
Skip option records writing_style_selection_skipped in state
Style choice records writing_style in state and loads corresponding skill
steps.notes: Markdown editing only -- no TDD. Validate via /nw:forge checklist.

steps.name: Draft command prerequisites update
steps.description: Update proposal-draft.md prerequisites to reference style checkpoint. Add note that style selection (or skip) is required before first section draft.
criteria: Prerequisites section mentions style checkpoint
Help text references /proposal quality discover as preparation step
